case_title: THE CITY TOW VS MIGUEL, MANDUJANO

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY THE CITY TOW AS TO DEFENDANT MIGUEL, MANDUJANO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-24-1999 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
